test.query: SELECT if(number % 100, number, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(25000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT multiIf(number % 100, number, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(25000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT and(number % 100 == 0, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(25000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT or(number % 100, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(25000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(number % 2, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(690000) FORMAT Null
SELECT and(not isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 20), 100))) FROM numbers(670000) FORMAT Null
SELECT isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)) or isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100)) or isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 20), 100)) FROM numbers(660000) FORMAT Null
SELECT multiIf(number >= 500000, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), less(number, 50000), number * 2, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(790000) FORMAT Null
SELECT toTypeName(isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100))) FROM numbers(60000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT toColumnTypeName(isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100))) FROM numbers(8000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 10)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(400000) FORMAT Null
SELECT and(isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 10)), not isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(400000) FORMAT Null
SELECT or(not isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(400000) FORMAT Null
SELECT multiIf(isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number + 10), 100))) FROM numbers(800000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(number % 2, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100))) FROM numbers(657174) FORMAT Null
SELECT multiIf(number % 2, isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100))) FROM numbers(780000) FORMAT Null
SELECT and(isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 10)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100))) from numbers(400000) FORMAT Null
SELECT or(not isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), not isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100)), isValidUTF8(repeat(toString(number), 100))) from numbers(620000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(number % 2, arraySum(bitPositionsToArray(number)), arraySum(bitPositionsToArray(number + 1))) FROM numbers(5000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(number % 5 == 0, arraySum(bitPositionsToArray(number)), 0) from numbers(22000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(number % 2, number + intDiv(number, number + 1), 3 + intDiv(number, number + 1)), if(number % 3 = 0, number, 4 + intDiv(number, number + 1)) FROM numbers(22000000) FORMAT Null
SELECT if(number % 5 == 0, toInt8OrZero(toString(number)), Null) FROM numbers(32000000) FORMAT Null
